name: Second Largest Element
category: Solve Problems on Arrays [Easy -> Medium -> Hard]
statement: Given an array of integers nums, return the second-largest element in the array. If the second-largest element does not exist, return -1.
constraints:
• 1 <= nums.length <= 105
  • -104 <= nums[i] <= 104
  • nums may contain duplicate elements.

examples.explanation: The largest value in nums is 8, the second largest is 7
The only value in nums is 10, so there is no second largest value, thus -1 is returned
